hooks.command:
input=$(cat); prompt=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.prompt // ""' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$prompt" | grep -qi 'ticket\|tkt-\|support ticket'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"SUPPORT TICKET WORKFLOW (mandatory — see CLAUDE.md):
1. READ from PROD_DATABASE_URL (Neon) — never the local DB — for live ticket state.
2. Analyse the ticket fully before touching code.
3. Fix and test locally against the local dev server.
4. Show a summary (root cause, files changed, test done) and ask the user to confirm before pushing.
5. After git push, run UPDATE statements against PROD_DATABASE_URL: set status, admin_notes (internal-only), and resolution (reporter-visible). Clarification questions → resolution field + status awaiting_user.
PROD_DATABASE_URL is the Neon connection string in .env.local."}}'; fi
